# EX09 - Daphne and Sruvya

## Summary of our project

We wanted to explore the perceived value of pre-lecture videos for students in COMP110. To do so, we zoomed in on 3 variables: `pre_lecture_videos`, `difficulty`, and `ls_effective`. Chart 1 is a distribution plot of students' opinion on the value of pre-lecture videos. Chart 2 is a box plot comparing students' opinion on the value of pre-lecture videos and their rated difficulty level of the course. Chart 3 is a line plot between students' perceived value of pre-lecture videos and lessons' effectiveness.

### Chart 1: Distribution plot
